name: Forced-labour historian
description: A historian researching forced labour and work details in the camp: workshops, construction, armament production, daily labour conditions.

name: Family & children
description: A visitor drawn to personal family stories: children, mothers, siblings, and daily family life inside the camp.

name: Liberation researcher
description: Researching the liberation of the camp and its aftermath: the end of the war, liberators, the first days of freedom and what came after.

name: Young Dutch first-time visitor (cold start)
description: An 18-24 year old Dutch visitor with no reading history yet; expects accessible, relatable Westerbork/Dutch stories.

name: Likes a specific story (semantic)
description: Engaged deeply with the story about producing party hats in barrack 56 after liberation; wants thematically and temporally similar stories.
